1. Verily, thus saith the Lord, I give unto the united order,
    organized agreeable to the commandment previously given, a
    revelation and commandment concerning my servant Shederlaomach
    (Frederick G. Williams), that ye shall receive him into the order.
    What I say unto one I say unto all.

Verily, thus saith the Lord, I give unto the united order, organized agreeable to the commandment previously gtven, a revelation and commandment concerning my servant Shederluomach, that ye shall receive him into the order. What 1 siy unto one I say unto all.

| Verily, thus saith the Lord, I give unto the united order, organized agreeable to , the commandment previously given, a revelation and commandment concerning my serj vant Shederlaomach, that ye shall receive I him into the order. What I say unto one, I say unto all.
And again, I say unto you my servant Frederick G. Williams, you shall be a lively member in this order; and inasmuch as you are faithful in keeping all former commandments you shall be blessed…

Verily, thus saith the Lord, I give unto the united order, organized agreeable to the commandment previously given, a revelation and commandment concerning my servant Frederick G. Williams, that ye shall receive him into the order. What I say unto one I say unto all.
